item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Water Resistant

about_item: Orthopedic Support:Experience a perfect combination of two of our signature fabrics. High-density memory foam ensures pressure relief with joint support while our intuitive egg-crate foam helps distribute weight evenly. This blissful blend of cozy materials provides an optimal balance of softness and support. Rest assured your pet will enjoy the ultimate dog sofa specifically designed for dreamy restful sleep.

Enhanced Function & Comfort：Our orthopedic dog sofa is thoughtfully designed with a three-sided bolster providing unmatched cushioning for ultimate comfort and security. The bolster is also filled with bouncy and fluffy fabrications specifically intended for head and neck support. Its overall structure sits at a low profile making easily accessible for pets with joint or knee problems.

Supremely Soft Textures Embodied in Versatile Minimalism：Our spacious and cozy dog bed, crafted with supremely soft faux fur for ultimate comfort, ensures rejuvenating rest for your pet year-round, while its stylish corduroy design and fashionable color palettes blend seamlessly with any home décor, adding a versatile minimalist and eye-catching modern touch.

Waterproof & Effortless Care：Our pet bed’s interior lining is designed to protect against water damage which also includes unwanted liquids or spillage. We also take pride in ensuring that our pet beds are hassle free when it comes to cleaning and maintenance. Simply remove the zipped cover in seconds and machine-wash for unlimited freshness.

Pre-Safe Fabrics：Proudly certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100（24.HCN.46956）and CertiPUR-US which are trusted authorities in fabric safety. Each of our foams feature non-toxic materials that undergo comprehensive safety and health guidelines. The non-slip bottom of the bed is also thoughtfully designed with rubberized dots for stability and foundation, reducing slips while offering structured safety.

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be well-made with surprising interior layers, and appreciate its amazing softness, with one noting its thick ribbed covering. The bed is big enough for two medium-sized dogs, appears durable, and customers consider it good value for money. They like its color and comfort, with one mentioning it's not an eye sore, and multiple customers say their pets love it.

authors_reviews.title: Love this Bedsure dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: This dog bed is so nice, I ordered the brown color it’s actually a pretty color, this bed feels thick and firm with plenty of softness I think I could lay on it and take a very comfortable nap!!!! We waited a little over 24 hours to give our German Shepard his new bed we were pleasantly surprised on how much it fluffed up! Took one or two nights for him to adjust to the new bed but he now loves it!! I highly recommend this dog bed
authors_reviews.author: Connie

authors_reviews.title: Great dog bed
authors_reviews.text: Beautiful, comfortable and durable bed.Perfect for our greyhound
authors_reviews.author: Felicia Hayes

authors_reviews.title: Great quality and reasonable price
authors_reviews.text: The bed looks good with the soft thick ribbed covering. It was easy to assemble and it’s washable too.It is also a little bigger than her old bed so she can really stretch out. But the best thing about the bed is she really loves it!!!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Quality
authors_reviews.text: Amazing! Super soft outside, comfy foam inside. Very nice Quality. My 80lb Ridgeback fits nicely on the Large. He loves it
authors_reviews.author: Tammy

authors_reviews.title: Dog approved product! Size Large.
authors_reviews.text: The bed looks great in my home and was very easy to assemble. The cover feels soft and the zipper seems sturdy. I ordered the large for my German Shepherd–Husky mix. Size is accurate, though I wish it were a bit thicker—right now it feels more like a padded mat than a plush bed. Still, my dog sleeps on it daily, so it must be comfortable enough. For the price, the quality and value are solid.
authors_reviews.author: jolynn

authors_reviews.title: Very Nice Dog bed
authors_reviews.text: The blue is gorgeous! Its very soft courderoy material is durable. The mattress inside is a nice, supportive orthopedic type with layers. My 80 lb older dog loves it! It looks nice in the living room.Very happy with the quality! Excellent price for this large of a bed too!
authors_reviews.author: Laura G.

authors_reviews.title: It’s a very good product
authors_reviews.text: It’s perfect and my dog loves it. She got in a very first day it was here. I did put the comforter that was on her other bed there to make sure she’d know that it was hers with the smell and she loves it. Thank you.
authors_reviews.author: Patrick M. Kelley

authors_reviews.title: Decent size super soft and sturdy
authors_reviews.text: Good value for the quality. Soft well-made comfy in both dogs love it highly recommend.!✨✨
authors_reviews.author: Alena Roby
